title: Shy Keenan
excerpt: Hello you :0) I really want us to start off on the right foot, so here's a little bit more about me, before you just go right ahead and fall madly 'in like' with me.
author: Shy Keenan

title: Phoenix Kitchen
excerpt: The Phoenix Working Playscale Kitchen - a creative CPTS management tool and artistic project.

title: H&G AR/VR App/Game
excerpt: The House & Garden AR/VR App/Game is a management tool made for & by those who manage Civilian Post Traumatic Stress.

title: The Phoenix Post
excerpt: Sara and I retired as advocates in 2017, we continue to work voluntarily for The Phoenix Post (registered Not For Profit).

title: Love Is Love
excerpt: I feel I was blessed to become the parent of LGBTQ twins, the core centre of an unspeakable joy that came into my life when they did.
author: Shy Keenan
